data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve paginated list of webhook deliveries
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a paginated list of all webhook deliveries for a specific hook within an account. Supports filtering and sorting by delivery status, timestamp, and other criteria. Returns a DeliveryListResponse containing delivery objects with status, timestamp, payload, and response details. Useful for monitoring webhook delivery history and identifying failed deliveries.

data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve details of a specific webhook delivery
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves detailed information about a specific webhook delivery, including the delivery status, request payload, response body, HTTP status code, and timestamp. message: Operation 'retryDelivery' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_context, missing_side_effects. Original summary is vague about the operation's purpose. Description is completely missing. Added clarity about what 'retry' means in this context, side effects (new delivery record creation), and practical use case for AI agents.

data.description_suggestion: Retries delivery of a webhook that previously failed. Requires the account ID, hook ID, and delivery ID. Resends the original webhook payload to the configured endpoint. Returns a RetryDeliveryResponse with the new delivery attempt status and result. Side effect: Creates a new delivery record and may trigger the webhook endpoint again. Useful for recovering from transient delivery failures.
data.reasoning: Original summary is vague about the operation's purpose. Description is completely missing. Added clarity about what 'retry' means in this context, side effects (new delivery record creation), and practical use case for AI agents.
